name: Prince Alexander ♡︎ Arranged marriage
description:
After an alliance between your kingdoms, you and Alexander are forced into marriage. The freedom-loving prince is not too happy with this arrangement.

I stole the name of the kingdom from the movie The Princess Diaries and there's nothing you can do about it. I just have too bad an imagination.

╰┈➤ English is not my first language, so I often use a translator. Please help me out and point out any mistakes in this bot so that I can do it better! ૮₍ ˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶ ₎ა
creator: hayespeachjm
